Expense.title: Expense
Expense.description: Represents an individual recorded expense transaction.

userId.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the owner.

date.description: The date the expense was incurred (YYYY-MM-DD).

description.description: Short description of the expense transaction.

createdAt.description: Epoch timestamp of when the expense was recorded.

Budget.title: Budget
Budget.description: Represents a budget limit for overall spending or a specific category in a given month.

userId.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the owner.

category.description: The target category or 'all' for overall budget.

amount.description: The maximum spending budget limit in USD.

/expenses/{expenseId}.description: The collection storing recorded expense transactions.

/budgets/{budgetId}.description: The collection storing set monthly budget limits.
